message:
feat: Change default OpenRouter model to DeepSeek Chat

**Changes:**
- Updated default model from Llama 3.1 8B to DeepSeek Chat
- DeepSeek Chat features:
  - ✅ Native tool support (no emulation needed)
  - ✅ 128K context window (vs 32K for Mistral 7B)
  - ✅ Fast and efficient ($0.14/M tokens)
  - ✅ High quality responses

**Files Modified:**
- src/cli-proxy.ts - 3 locations
- src/cli/claude-code-wrapper.ts - 2 locations
- src/agents/claudeAgent.ts
- src/cli-standalone-proxy.ts
- src/agents/directApiAgent.ts

**Benefits:**
- Eliminates context length errors in Claude Code interactive mode
- Better tool handling with native support
- Maintains cost-effectiveness
- Previously working configuration restored

Resolves context window issues in interactive Claude Code sessions

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -281,7 +281,7 @@ export async function directApiAgent(
           const params: ChatParams = {
             model: provider === 'gemini'
               ? (process.env.COMPLETION_MODEL || 'gemini-2.0-flash-exp')
-              : (process.env.COMPLETION_MODEL || 'meta-llama/llama-3.1-8b-instruct'),
+              : (process.env.COMPLETION_MODEL || 'deepseek/deepseek-chat'),
             messages: messagesWithSystem,
             maxTokens: 8192,
             temperature: 0.7
